project_type: Kotlin Multiplatform (KMP) game with Compose UI - desktop + Android
build_system: Gradle with Kotlin DSL, JetBrains Compose plugin 1.7.3, Kotlin 2.1.21
test_framework: kotlin.test in commonTest source set, run via ./gradlew desktopTest
verification_instructions: 1. Run ./gradlew desktopTest to verify all tests pass. 2. Run ./gradlew :composeApp:run to manually verify UI changes.
setup_instructions: JDK 17+ required. Run ./gradlew build for first setup.
environment_constraints: OPEN_INTERNET network mode. No LLM/AI dependencies in gameplay - everything must be deterministic and work offline after build.
contribution_requirements: No AI/LLM calls in gameplay loop. Deterministic combat. Game runs with ./gradlew :composeApp:run
key_patterns: Compose animations available via compose.foundation (includes animateColorAsState, AnimatedVisibility, etc). Combat is tick-based via CombatEngine.tick(). Enemies attack in enemyTurn(). All enemies currently use strikeParty() which targets livingParty().firstOrNull(). EnemyArchetype enum defines stats. Tests use kotlin.test with deterministic Random seeds.
directory_structure: GAIME/composeApp/src/commonMain/kotlin/rpg/ - game logic (combat, questbook, bark), GAIME/composeApp/src/commonMain/kotlin/ui/rpg/ - Compose UI, GAIME/composeApp/src/commonTest/kotlin/ - tests
